approved_by: All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE)
accredited_by: National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC) - Grade A
National Board of Accreditation (NBA) for several programs

campus_details.campus_description: Green and technology-enabled campus located on Shavige Malleshwara Hills in South Bengaluru with modern infrastructure, laboratories, library facilities, and Wi-Fi connectivity.

academic_overview.undergraduate_programs: Multiple Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) programs across major engineering disciplines
academic_overview.postgraduate_programs: Postgraduate programs including M.Tech, MBA, and MCA
academic_overview.doctoral_programs: Research and PhD programs in multiple engineering departments

key_highlights: Autonomous engineering college affiliated with VTU
Strong industry collaborations and research culture
Active placement cell with major recruiters such as TCS, Infosys, Accenture, Bosch, and SAP
Centers of Excellence in areas like AI, Machine Learning, IoT, Robotics, and VLSI
Innovation and Entrepreneurship Development Cell supporting startups
Wi-Fi enabled campus with modern laboratories and smart classrooms
Vibrant campus life with technical clubs, student chapters, and cultural activities
